column1: # Intent verbs — promote prompt to at least Standard tier; trigger grill #1.
#   - Single-character CJK verbs (做 / 改 / 加 / 写 / 修 / 审 / 搭) removed —
#     they fired on neighbouring characters too aggressively (修 hit 修订, 修改
#     hit incidentally regardless). Specific 2-char compounds remain.
#   - Whitespace hacks for ASCII (add , test ) retired — `do_it_prompt_has_any`
#     now applies word-boundary matching to pure-ASCII terms automatically.
